data.text: Ramesh Singh w/o Anirban Mukherjee, a 50-year-old patient, presented to KIMS Hospital Bhubaneswar on 13 July 2021 with complaints recorded in the clinical report. The patient was evaluated by Dr. S. Krishnan. Hospital records include contact number 9255389410 and ABHA ID 25-2434-3301-8753. The patient reported symptoms such as fatigue, dizziness, and mild fever. Clinical examination and investigations were performed, and appropriate treatment was initiated.
